name: Windows Event Logging Disabled Via Registry
notes:
This rule detects tampering with the "Enabled" registry key in order to disable windows logging of a windows event channel.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
SIGMA Title: Disable Windows Event Logging Via Registry
SIGMA Description: Detects tampering with the "Enabled" registry key in order to disable windows logging of a windows event channel


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches Registry Key (custom) contains any of \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels
when the event matches Registry Key (custom) matches any of expressions \\Enabled$
when the event matches Registry Value Data (custom) contains any of DWORD (0x00000000)
when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\system32\wevtutil.exe
when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\winsxs\, Process Name (custom) is any of TiWorker.exe

when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\System32\svchost.exe, Registry Key (custom) contains any of [\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-FileInfoMinifilter or \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-ASN1 or \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-AppCompat or \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Runtime\Error]

when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\servicing\TrustedInstaller.exe, Registry Key (custom) contains any of \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Compat-Appraiser
TD_list: APPLY Windows Event Logging Disabled Via Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches Registry Key (custom) contains any of \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels
AND when the event matches Registry Key (custom) matches any of expressions \\Enabled$
AND when the event matches Registry Value Data (custom) contains any of DWORD (0x00000000)
AND NOT when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\system32\wevtutil.exe
AND NOT when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\winsxs\, Process Name (custom) is any of TiWorker.exe

AND NOT when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\System32\svchost.exe, Registry Key (custom) contains any of [\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-FileInfoMinifilter or \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-ASN1 or \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-AppCompat or \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Runtime\Error]

AND NOT when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of \Windows\servicing\TrustedInstaller.exe, Registry Key (custom) contains any of \Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Compat-Appraiser
RED_list: Event name: Windows Event Logging Disabled Via Registry
Event description: Detects tampering with the "Enabled" registry key in order to disable windows logging of a windows event channel
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
